comments.author: @rosalierodrigues6612
comments.text:
Is this just about Eastern MA? Other than the Berkshires, I didn't see Western MA. No doubt Eastern MA is beautiful and great for tourists, but Western MA has a lot to offer also. I'm from Springfield, the City of Firsts. It has a rich history of "firsts" and beautiful museums, parks and restaurants. Surrounding cities and towns also offer some of the same. The Basketball Hall of Fame is in Springfield (where basketball was invented). Dr.Suess was from Springfield. Also, Springfield was home to the Indian Motorcycle Company, and the Springfield Armory, appointed by George Washington as the country's official arsenal.
Springfield is also home to the MGM Hotel and Casino, which hosts many famous acts as well as weekly outdoor summer concerts. I did enjoy the video though, because Massachusetts is a very beautiful state that I am proud to be from. ❤

comments.author: @ms.anthropik
comments.text: I'm from New Bedford and I didn't expect it to be on the list.
